issue_title: [Bug] GCP Vertex AI streaming responses drop connections on HTTP/2 proxy
issue_body:
### Description
When using `gemini` with Vertex AI backend over an internal corporate HTTP/2 proxy, long streaming responses drop midway with a socket hangup error.

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Set `GOOGLE_GENAI_USE_VERTEXAI=true`
2. Run `gemini -p "Generate large architecture document"`

### Actual Behavior
Stream drops after 30 seconds with `FetchError: socket hang up`.

### Expected Behavior
Response streams to completion over proxy connection.
notes: Custom handcrafted NEEDS_INFO edge case issue created by Chad. Enterprise proxy streaming bug lacking Node runtime version and HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY env settings. Note: Issue IDs 1-99 are custom made by Chad for benchmark testing.
